original_query: select o_year, sum(case when nation = 'ALGERIA' then volume else 0 end) / sum(volume) as mkt_share from ( select extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume, n2.n_name as nation from part, supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2, region where p_partkey = l_partkey and s_suppkey = l_suppkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_custkey = c_custkey and c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'AFRICA' and s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and o_orderdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' and p_type = 'LARGE BURNISHED TIN' ) as all_nations group by o_year order by o_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    o_year, 
    SUM(CASE WHEN nation = 'ALGERIA' THEN volume ELSE 0 END) / SUM(volume) AS mkt_share 
FROM (
    SELECT 
        EXTRACT(YEAR FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year, 
        l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) AS volume, 
        n2.n_name AS nation 
    FROM part
    INNER JOIN lineitem ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey
    INNER JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    INNER JOIN nation n2 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN orders ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    INNER JOIN customer ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey
    INNER JOIN nation n1 ON customer.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    INNER JOIN region ON n1.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey
    WHERE region.r_name = 'AFRICA'
        AND orders.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
        AND part.p_type = 'LARGE BURNISHED TIN'
) AS all_nations 
GROUP BY o_year 
ORDER BY o_year;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Replaced implicit joins with explicit INNER JOIN syntax to improve query readability and potentially help the query planner choose a better join order.
Restructured the query to make join conditions explicit and separate from filtering conditions in the WHERE clause.
